title: Ingots to Raw - Mystical Agriculture
description: A data pack that changes the ingots that can be made from smelting to raw ores when using Mystical Agriculture Essences
body:
So you've set up a huge factory for processing your raw ore coming from your trips to the mines. 

You decide to set up a Mystical Agriculture farm to get some materials without digging but it gives you the straight ingots!

So now your factory is going to waste. sat there gathering digital dust.

Well, this gives you the raw ore from your essence rather than your ingots. Yes, it means extra steps, but it also means you're not wasting your factory.

It's a direct conversion, so the quantity you'd receive as ingots, you'll get as raw ore. Iron Essence would usually give 6 ingots, but it now gives you 6 raw ore (which you can double or more with the right mods).

### Supported Materials
**Minecraft**
- Iron
- Copper
- Gold

**Common**
- Aluminium
- Tin
- Lead
- Silver
- Nickel
- Zinc
- Platinum
- Iridium
- Yellorium

**Powah**
- Uraninite

**Twilight Forest**
- Ironwood
- Knightmetal (gives Armor Shard Clusters)
